SCALE_META.3: Even when I don't need to

SEX_ID_A.name: Sexual Identity A
SEX_ID_A.question: Which gender do you most identify with?
selection: Agender (no pronouns)
Female (she, her, hers)
Male (he, him, his)
Non-binary (they, them, theirs)

SEX_ID_B.name: Sexual Identity B
SEX_ID_B.question: Which peers do you feel most comfortable spending time with?
selection: Females only
Females mostly
I don't mind
Males mostly
Males only

SEX_ORI_A.name: Sexual Orientation A
SEX_ORI_A.question: Do you feel sexually active?
selection: No / I don't care
Barely
Sometimes
Often
A lot

SEX_ORI_B.name: Sexual Orientation B
SEX_ORI_B.question: Choose any genders that you feel attracted to

SEX_ORI_C.name: Sexual Orientation C
SEX_ORI_C.question: Choose any aspects of sexuality that you seek in others
options: Their physical sexual expression (how they look)

RIGIDITY_B.name: Rigidity B
RIGIDITY_B.question: Do you seek others different from you?

RIGIDITY_D.name: Rigidity D
RIGIDITY_D.question: Do you spend time to learn about the world and others?

DILIGENCE_A.name: Diligence A
DILIGENCE_A.question: Do you work at tasks that cause you discomfort or disgust?

DILIGENCE_B.name: Diligence B
DILIGENCE_B.question: Do you complete previously-started tasks even when tired?

DILIGENCE_C.name: Diligence C
DILIGENCE_C.question: Do you tolerate crowded, cluttered, and noisy places?

DILIGENCE_D.name: Diligence D
DILIGENCE_D.question:
Do you tolerate the elements, getting wet, dirty, sweaty, 
or approaching sources of discomfort and disgust?

SALIENCE_B.name: Salience B
SALIENCE_B.question: Do you seek relationships with your peers?

SALIENCE_C.name: Salience C
SALIENCE_C.question: Do you share your food with others?

SALIENCE_D.name: Salience D
SALIENCE_D.question: Do you share your home with others?

COMPLIANCE_A.name: Compliance A
COMPLIANCE_A.question: Do you donate others your surplus commodities?

COMPLIANCE_B.name: Compliance B
COMPLIANCE_B.question: Do you tolerate the decisions of your peers?

COMPLIANCE_D.name: Compliance D
COMPLIANCE_D.question: Do you take risks to help a friend?

SENSITIVITY_A.name: Sensitivity A
SENSITIVITY_A.question: Do you let others know how you feel?

SENSITIVITY_B.name: Sensitivity B
SENSITIVITY_B.question: Do you ask others how they feel?

SENSITIVITY_C.name: Sensitivity C
SENSITIVITY_C.question: Do you interrupt your current task if it makes you sad?

SENSITIVITY_D.name: Sensitivity D
SENSITIVITY_D.question: Do you change your plan based on your feelings?

EXP_ID_A.name: Experienced Identity A
EXP_ID_A.question: Do you have a solid idea of who you are?

EXP_ID_B.name: Experienced Identity B
EXP_ID_B.question: Do you abide by your principles?

EXP_ID_C.name: Experienced Identity C
EXP_ID_C.question: Do you trust your own feelings?

EXP_ID_D.name: Experienced Identity D
EXP_ID_D.question: Are you confident in your own abilities?

EMOTE_A.name: Emotionality A
EMOTE_A.question: Do you recognize your emotions as they express?

EMOTE_B.name: Emotionality B
EMOTE_B.question: Do you let your emotions guide your actions?

EMOTE_C.name: Emotionality C
EMOTE_C.question: Do you identify emotions in others?

EMOTE_D.name: Emotionality D
EMOTE_D.question: Do you let the emotions of others influence your own?

RATION_A.name: Rationality A
RATION_A.question: Do you spend time to think about yourself and your own identity?

RATION_B.name: Rationality B
RATION_B.question: Do you stop to think about your situation before you act?

RATION_C.name: Rationality C
RATION_C.question:
Do you spend time to think about the identity of your peers 
and your relationship to them?

RATION_D.name: Rationality D
RATION_D.question:
Do you stop to think about the effects of your decisions 
on others before you act?

TRUST_B.name: Trust B
TRUST_B.question: Did you believe the promises of your friends?

TRUST_C.name: Trust C
TRUST_C.question: Did you let strangers come near or inside your home?

TRUST_D.name: Trust D
TRUST_D.question: Do you follow your friend to an unknown place?

PRIVACY_A.name: Privacy A
PRIVACY_A.question: Are you afraid of the outside?

PRIVACY_B.name: Privacy B
PRIVACY_B.question: Do you feel safe at home?

PRIVACY_C.name: Privacy C
PRIVACY_C.question: Do you eat the food offered by a friend?

PRIVACY_D.name: Privacy D
PRIVACY_D.question: Do you tolerate a stranger peacefully sitting next to you?

PASSION_A.name: Passion A
PASSION_A.question: Do you invest 100% effort in what you do?

PASSION_B.name: Passion B
PASSION_B.question:
Do you spend energy in activities that aren't immediately 
useful to our survival but you feel like doing anyway?

PASSION_C.name: Passion C
PASSION_C.question:
Do you participate in activities that your friends feel 
enthusiastic about even when you don't?

PASSION_D.name: Passion D
PASSION_D.question: Which activity are you most attracted to?
selection: Home / Self improvement
Playing and competing with others
Travelling and exploring
Leisure and pleasure

PERC_ID_A.name: Perceived Identity A
PERC_ID_A.question: Define yourself in a single word

PERC_ID_B.name: Perceived Identity B
PERC_ID_B.question: Define your personality with a single adjective

PERC_ID_C.name: Perceived Identity C
PERC_ID_C.question: Choose an option that best defines the story of your life so far
selection: Boring
Empty
Troubled
Peaceful
Exciting
Dark
Happy
Tragic
Swinging
Adventurous
Exhausting
Interesting

PERC_ID_D.name: Perceived Identity D
PERC_ID_D.question: Choose any one or more option that relates to who you are
options: My uncle and/or auntie spent time with me
I spent time with my cousins
I had a childhood best friend
I am still friend with my childhood best friend
I remember the place where I grew up
I know my way back home

SURV_A.name: Survival A
SURV_A.question: Your home is under attack:
selection: I have a safe room to hide in
I stand my ground and fight off the intruders
I flee through my escape hatch
I call my allies to help me

SURV_B.name: Survival B
SURV_B.question:
During your trip, you meet an enemy travelling the 
	opposite direction:
selection: I retreat to a safer spot until the coast is clear
I keep going and prepare for battle
I take my route B the long way around to avoid the threat
I let them pass peacefully

SURV_C.name: Survival C
SURV_C.question:
There is a dangerous storm outside and you don't have 
	enough food for both you and your loved one:
selection: We ration the food, even if it makes us both weaker
I take my chances fighting them to get all the food
We both take our chances to go look for food outside
I risk my life to go out looking for more food while they stay safe

SURV_D.name: Survival D
SURV_D.question:
Your loved one is under attack by a much more 
	powerful enemy that you can take on:
selection: I give up my loved one and save myself
I die for my loved one
I risk my loved one as bait while I figure out a way to flank the enemy
I risk both my loved one and myself by taking the enemy on together

COMP_A.name: Competition A
COMP_A.question: You and your enemy converge on the same treasure:
selection: I play it safe waiting and collect the leftovers later
I fight to the death to get the treasure
I go look for another treasure
I probe the enemy at a safe distance to try and dissuade them away

COMP_B.name: Competition B
COMP_B.question:
A bunch of you in the same peer group are competing 
	for the attention of a love interest:
selection: I don't risk fighting and just show them what I am capable of
I must show everyone that I am the best choice, even if I risk humiliation
I look for another love interest somewhere else
I avoid the fight and find out what the love interest likes most

COMP_C.name: Competition C
COMP_C.question:
Food is running low because the enemy is hoarding it with 
	the help of allies:
selection: I don't risk becoming their prey and just collect the scraps
I train myself to become stronger and prepare to risk my life to defeat them
I take my chances to relocate somewhere free of enemies
I play it safe while I make friends and build my own stronger army

COMP_D.name: Competition D
COMP_D.question: Your group is arguing for a solution to a crisis:
selection: I avoid the argument and pursue my own secret solution
I impose my argument over others even if I risk humiliation
I avoid the argument and try to solve the crisis on my own
I try to get to an agreement with the others

INTER_A.name: Interaction A
INTER_A.question: There are multiple routes to your destination:
selection: I take the safest route, even if it's longer
I take the fastest route, even if it's dangerous
I risk the unknown to come up with a custom route
I ask my peers for advice

INTER_B.name: Interaction B
INTER_B.question:
During your food commute, you discover a cave with an 
	opening at the other side:
selection: I don't risk it and continue my familiar route
I take my chances in the cave, hoping for treasure
I spend time to figure out where the cave leads
I ask my peers for advice

INTER_C.name: Interaction C
INTER_C.question: You're about to go on a trip:
selection: I planned a route in detail
I will improvise and face whatever obstacle head on
I planned a general direction, but I expect diversions
I ask my peers for advice

INTER_D.name: Interaction D
INTER_D.question: You must take shelter from an incoming storm:
selection: I had previously spent time and energy to built a shelter
I invade someone else's shelter
I have options that I discovered in my previous travels
I count on my peers to help me with the shelter

ADAPT_A.name: Adaptation A
ADAPT_A.question: You must share your home turf with many different species:
selection: I play it safe in my own limited but private space
I force myself on others to maximize my own space
I search for an emptier place
I try to integrate within the group

ADAPT_B.name: Adaptation B
ADAPT_B.question: You made it this far in life thanks mostly to:
selection: avoiding useless risks by being content with frugal loot
boldly taking risks to achieve the most treasure
taking time and energy in travelling to find rare loot
the help of my friends and the strength in numbers

ADAPT_C.name: Adaptation C
ADAPT_C.question:
You struggle to find food in your home area because 
	everyone is better at it than you:
selection: I master a reliable method to get me enough food
I fight others to steal their food
I learn a bit of everything so I am ready for any opportunity I get
I build my own group of allies so we can share food

ADAPT_D.name: Adaptation D
ADAPT_D.question: The best lesson you learn in life so far is:
selection: 'slow and steady wins the race'
'survival of the fittest'
'one door closes, another opens'
'sharing is caring'
